windows.old_description: Dipped tapers hung to cool between coats.
windows.embed_text_v2: Displaying finished sculptural candles, camera panning across twisted root- and branch-shaped beeswax candles in natural yellow and black, standing on weighted bases on a stainless steel table beside a metal baking tray, white wall background.
windows.summary_v2: Camera slowly pans across an array of finished, twisted root- and branch-shaped sculptural candles in natural yellow beeswax and black wax displayed on a stainless steel table.

tags_v2.setting: stainless steel worktable against white wall

seconds_v2.desc: Close overhead view of a stainless steel table; a twisted yellow beeswax sculptural candle and a black knotted candle stand on weighted black bases beside a metal baking tray.
Camera pulls back slightly; a yellow wax candle twisted into a looping branch-like knot stands on the steel surface next to a black braided candle, with a metal tray between them.
View widens to show several twisted yellow and black root-like candles on weighted bases arranged around a silver baking tray on the steel table.
Camera pans across multiple sculptural candles resembling intertwined roots and branches, in natural yellow wax and black, standing upright on dark bases by the tray.
Wider pan reveals a group of tall twisting candles shaped like tree roots and tentacles, some yellow, some black, casting shadows on the white wall behind the steel table.
Continued pan over an array of branching yellow beeswax candles and dark twisted candles standing on the table, a flat metal tray centered among them.
Camera surveys the finished display of antler- and root-like candles in yellow and black wax, upright on weighted bases against the white backdrop.
Pan continues across the curing sculptural candles; slender forked yellow candles and a dark spiral candle rise from the steel surface beside the silver tray.
Final view shows a fuller row of twisting black and yellow candles shaped like roots, branches and hands, with visible wicks, standing on the steel table by the wall.
